reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

reviews.text:
OMG! The finish on this case is so soft I can't stop touching it! ... Good touch, not bad touch.
I've been super impressed with everything I've bought from Elago since I discovered them and they are my go-to brand for phone cases. I saw this Airpod case listed for a very reasonable price and being Elago I didn't really think twice when selecting it. I was not disappointed!
Great fit and manufacture. And the finish on the silicone is easily the softest and most even I've even seen/felt. It's so soft. I find myself mindlessly picking it up while sitting at my computer and running my fingers over the surface turning it in my hand because it feels so nice. Elago knocked it out of the park again.

reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

reviews.title: Over-the-top quality

The braided cable is substantial. The connectors are copper, high quality, and fit snugly. If you don't mind the price, these are very nice cables.

reviews.title: Great earbuds that fit well, sound good, and have long battery life!
reviews.text: The earbuds have pretty good sound and the main reason I love them is most earbuds don't fit well in my ears, but the ear fins make it snug and a good fit. They are fairly easy to connect to bluetooth devices. The case seems to hold a lot of battery and lasts a long time and I like that it charges with USB-C. The ear fins on the earbuds make it very snug and a good fit in my ears, and this also makes it noise cancelling. The case is a nice small size too. I've used it for almost a month and I have no complaints about them :)

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

Great price for everything.

reviews.title: Phone does not ring in earbuds.
reviews.text: I would have given a 5-star review, but my S20 FE 5G rings out loud for everyone to hear rather than in the earbuds.  I purchased these earbuds to listen to music at the office.  When my phone rings, the volume of the ring matches the volume of the music, which would be fine, except that it's not ringing in the earbuds.  It rings out loud, which disturbs those around me.
